title: BTEUP Date Sheet 2026 OUT

detail.title: BTEUP Date Sheet 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: BTEUP Date Sheet 2026 for Even Semester May exams is out. Check branch-wise polytechnic exam scheme, subject-wise dates, timings, official PDF link and steps to download.

content.text: Board of Technical Education, Uttar Pradesh, Lucknow has officially released the BTEUP Date Sheet 2026 for Even Semester (May-2026) examinations for various P.G. Diploma and Diploma courses. The proposed examination scheme includes detailed subject-wise dates and timings, with exams commencing from 13 May 2026. The official BTEUP Date Sheet 2026 is available on the official website - https://bteup.ac.in/. Students can download the complete PDF and check their branch-specific schedule using the branch code and subject codes provided in the document.
Download the BTEUP Date Sheet 2026 PDF here and prepare your exam timetable accordingly.
Download BTEUP Date Sheet 2026 PDF (Even Semester May 2026)

links.text: Download BTEUP Date Sheet 2026 PDF (Even Semester May 2026)

content.text: Students are advised to verify all details carefully from the official document and contact the board in case of any discrepancy.

The BTEUP Date Sheet 2026 presents the complete examination schedule for the Even Semester May 2026 across multiple technical diploma and post-graduate diploma programmes. Last updated on 16 April 2026, this official scheme covers theory examinations with specific dates, timings, question paper numbers and branch codes for smooth conduct of exams.

rows: Board of Technical Education, Uttar Pradesh (BTEUP)
On or after 01 June 2026 (varies by branch)
P.G. Diploma & Diploma courses (101 to 319 branches and more)

sections.heading: How to Download BTEUP Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the BTEUP Date Sheet 2026 from the official website in just a few simple steps. The complete proposed examination scheme PDF is available for all branches and contains the latest updated schedule for Even Semester May 2026 exams.

items: Open any web browser on your mobile or computer and visit the official BTEUP website.
On the homepage, locate the Examination or Date Sheet section and click on it.
Find and select the link titled Even Semester May 2026 or Proposed Examination Scheme 2026.
The PDF file will open - click the download icon to save it directly to your device.
Once downloaded, open the file and use the search option to locate your branch code.
View your subject-wise dates and timings, then take a printout for quick reference during exam preparation.

content.text: Always cross-check the downloaded BTEUP Date Sheet 2026 carefully and keep a copy handy for your exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in BTEUP Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official BTEUP Date Sheet 2026 PDF includes every important detail students need to know for the Even Semester May 2026 examinations. The document is clearly structured for easy understanding across all branches.

items: Branch Code and full Branch Name
Question Paper Number (Qp.No.)
Semester Code
Complete Subject Name
Exact Examination Date
Timings (Morning / Afternoon sessions)
Effective and Last Updated information
Elective subject options where applicable
Special notes for lateral entry and specific courses
